summary: Completed testing of Iteration 23 - Competitor Title Search Feature. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including Title Search Only tab, search method badges (Image Match, Title Fallback, Title Search), and title-based competitor search.
critical_code_review_comments: Title Search Only tab correctly added to AnalysisDialog with 3 tabs: Select from Products, Upload Image, Title Search Only
Search method badges display correctly: 🖼️ Image Match (blue), 🔍 Title Fallback (orange), 📝 Title Search (purple)
Title search endpoint /api/competitor/search-by-title works correctly with DuckDuckGo web search
Title fallback in /api/competitor/analyze-from-url triggers when image search returns no results
WebSearchService properly implements DuckDuckGo HTML search with shopping site filtering
Analysis results correctly store and display search_method field
Info text in dialog explains each search mode clearly
Price extraction background task works for title search results
seed_data_creation: Created test analyses via title search: Nike Air Max Running Shoes (title_search), Designer Leather Handbag Women (title_fallback)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 Competitor Title Search feature fully tested. Backend APIs: POST /api/competitor/search-by-title (direct title search), POST /api/competitor/analyze-from-url (with title fallback). Frontend: CompetitorDashboard.jsx with AnalysisDialog component has 3 tabs - Select from Products, Upload Image, Title Search Only. Search method badges display in AnalysisResultsCard component. WebSearchService uses DuckDuckGo HTML search for title-based competitor discovery.
